arts.ttl: “Won’t give up” | West Ham defender admits discontent under Lopetegui
arts.sum: West Ham defender Vladimir Coufal has admitted his discontent at the club this season. The Czech international has seen his first team opportunities somewhat suffer since the arrival of Head Coach Julen Lopetegui in the summer, who tends to opt for summer signing Aaron Wan-Bissaka in the right-wing-back position this season so far. It’s been... The post “Won’t give up” | West Ham defender admits discontent under Lopetegui appeared first on The West Ham Way.

arts.ttl: Isak's return to form spells danger for West Ham
arts.sum: Alexander Isak goes into Monday night’s match at home to West Ham United bang in form, having netted five goals in his last six appearances for club and country. No player has ever netted multiple goals in three consecutive matches against West Ham before, so Isak has the chance to make a small piece of history.

arts.ttl: Miserable West Ham record Newcastle United must extend
arts.sum: Fast forward 11 months and the Hammers head to St James' Park to face Newcastle United on Monday having won away from home just three times since. Their trip to Tyneside will be their 18th on the road in 2024 in all competitions, but life away from the London Stadium has not been enjoyable under first David Moyes and now Julen Lopetegui.

arts.ttl: Report: Ex-West Ham boss 'serious contender' to be PL rivals manager after what he did for Irons

arts.ttl: Newcastle eye stunning swoop for trio
arts.sum: Newcastle are gearing up ahead of the January transfer window and they have been linked to three players who can bolster their attack. Paul Mitchell on Newcastle's January transfers

arts.sum: Tony Cascarino believes Michael Carrick would be an “obvious choice” to replace Julen Lopetegui as manager of West Ham United. The Spaniard has found himself... The post 'Obvious Candidate' - talkSPORT host names manager West Ham fans would love to replace Lopetegui appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United 'firm up' transfer talks after mini summit with PIF in Riyadh
arts.sum: Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe and sporting director Paul Mitchell held a mini transfer summit with Toon chiefs during their visit to Saudi Arabia last week. However, Howe is expected to hold further transfer discussions with chiefs at St James' Park in the next fortnight.

arts.ttl: England's Eddie Howe decision surprised me - but I'm delighted he's staying at Newcastle United - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: “I'm not particularly bothered where the manager of England comes from, if anything you should just choose the best person for the job,” Burn told The Sports Agents podcast.. However, he's delighted the Newcastle head coach is staying on Tyneside, and says the fact he was heavily linked with the role highlights what a good job he's doing at St James' Park.

arts.ttl: Newcastle target Rayan Cherki and Jonathan David
arts.sum: Newcastle United are looking to strengthen their side in January and have set their sights on Ligue 1 with Olympique Lyonnais’ Rayan Cherki (21) and Lille OSC’s Jonathan David (24)…
